title: ‘I Regret It 100 Per Cent… I Haven’t Slept or Eaten for Three Days, I Only See Those Children’: Jabalpur Cruise Captain Recalls Final Moments Before Tragedy
description: Three days after the Bargi Dam cruise tragedy in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, the captain of the ill-fated Narmada Queen has broken down, recalling how a routine evening ride turned into one of the state’s worst tourism disasters. At least nine people died and several remain missing after the vessel capsized in a sudden storm. Survivors and viral videos have exposed serious safety lapses, including delayed life jacket use and the absence of a rescue boat.
